question: Buatkan YAML Pod yang me-mount ConfigMap bernama 'app-config' sebagai volume di path /etc/config

ground_truth.answer:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: app-pod
spec:
  volumes:
  - name: config-volume
    configMap:
      name: app-config
  containers:
  - name: app
    image: nginx:latest
    volumeMounts:
    - name: config-volume
      mountPath: /etc/config
context: Volume: represents a named volume in a pod
ConfigMapVolumeSource: adapts a ConfigMap into a volume
VolumeMount: describes a mounting of a Volume within a container
